articles.title: JONY IVE'S SECRETIVE AI HARDWARE REPORTEDLY DELAYED BY THREE FUNDAMENTAL PROBLEMS
articles.summary: OpenAI's upcoming AI hardware device, currently being designed by Jony Ive, has reportedly been delayed due to three major challenges: insufficient computing power, unresolved privacy concerns over its always-on cameras and microphones, and difficulty defining its personality and conversational boundaries. The device, known as “io”, is neither a phone nor glasses and aims to feel like a helpful friend rather than a “weird AI girlfriend.” It may not launch next year as planned.

articles.title: PERPLEXITY ACQUIRES THE TEAM BEHIND SEQUOIA-BACKED AI DESIGN STARTUP VISUAL ELECTRIC
articles.summary: Visual Electric, a Sequoia-backed AI design startup founded in 2022, announced it is being acquired by search startup Perplexity, with its team joining a new Agent Experiences group. The acquisition will result in Visual Electric shutting down its product within 90 days, offering users data export and prorated refunds. The startup, which raised $2.5 million and built AI-powered image creation tools for designers on an infinite canvas, was founded by former employees from Facebook, Dropbox, Apple, and Microsoft.

articles.title: SQUARESPACE AND PERPLEXITY PARTNER TO REIMAGINE BUSINESS CREATION IN THE AI ERA
articles.summary: Squarespace partnered with Perplexity to integrate its website-building and hosting services into Comet, Perplexity's browser, enabling users to transition seamlessly from AI-powered research to professional business creation. Through Comet's conversational interface, users receive guidance on domain registration, brand development, and design while accessing Squarespace's AI optimization tools for enhanced discoverability. The collaboration aims to help businesses make a strong first impression when discovered through AI-powered search and answer engines.

articles.title: MICROSOFT OFFICE REBRAND DEMONSTRATES "HOW AI IS SHIFTING THE DISCIPLINE OF DESIGN"
articles.summary: Microsoft has refreshed its ten core Office app icons for the first time since 2018, introducing smoother curves, vibrant gradients, and simplified shapes to make them more legible and approachable. The subtle redesign maintains familiar letter plates for instant recognition and reflects how AI is influencing design and product development. The new icons will roll out soon across web, desktop, and mobile.

articles.title: WHY NO IDEA IS FINAL
articles.summary: In design, iteration is essential—ideas are tested, refined, and improved—while in life and philosophy, people often cling to fixed beliefs as part of their identity. Adopting the designer's mindset means viewing our choices, careers, relationships, and convictions as hypotheses to evolve through experience and feedback. Growth, then, comes not from defending old ideas, but from revising them with honesty and courage, choosing truth and adaptability over pride and rigidity.

articles.title: AI WILL HAPPILY DESIGN THE WRONG THING FOR YOU
articles.summary: AI tools are powerful leverage for design and product development, but they amplify whatever users bring to them—whether that's deep user understanding or poor judgment about unsolved problems. While AI excels at processing information and streamlining tedious tasks, it cannot replace the human skills of taste, curation, and genuine curiosity required to build products that people actually want. Designers who either completely resist AI or treat it as a magic solution will struggle, while those who combine human insight with AI capability will thrive.

articles.title: AI CREATIVE SUITE
articles.summary: ImagineArt is an AI creative suite that generates images, videos, shorts, and voice from text prompts. The platform features advanced editing tools, a background remover, an upscaler, and custom models.

articles.title: CREATE VIRAL FACELESS SHORTS AUTOMATICALLY
articles.summary: Automatically create viral faceless shorts for YouTube, TikTok, and Instagram. Build your faceless channel effortlessly.

articles.title: SVELTE ANIMATIONS COMPONENTS
articles.summary: Free and open-source components built using Svelte 5, Tailwind CSS, and Motion-Start.

articles.title: COLLINS' IDENTITY FOR A NEW CLIMATE MOVEMENT EMULATES THE HEALING FEELING OF SITTING IN THE SUN
articles.summary: Collins has created a visual identity for Sun Day, a new global climate action movement founded by Bill McKibben and Denis Hayes that emphasizes unity, collective action, and the healing power of solar energy. The identity features a flexible half-sun logo that invites individuals to “complete” it, symbolizing shared participation, alongside a living typeface inspired by protest posters and a digital platform where people worldwide can contribute their own suns, reinforcing the idea that everyone is part of one global, solar-powered community.

articles.title: 10 ESSENTIAL SKETCHBOOK WARM-UP EXERCISES TO GET INTO THE CREATIVE FLOW
articles.summary: Sketchbook warm-up exercises help artists loosen up physically and mentally, improving line quality, coordination, and focus before drawing. Common warm-ups include mark-making, drawing parallel lines, circles, shading, scribbling, blind contour drawing, 3D forms, gesture sketches, and creating variations—all designed to build confidence and fluidity. Some artists warm up by directly planning elements of their upcoming sketch.

articles.title: GOOD UX IS STILL IMPORTANT EVEN WHEN USERS ARE FORCED TO USE YOUR SOFTWARE
articles.summary: Designing internal applications presents unique challenges, as users are often required to use the software, making traditional metrics such as user retention irrelevant for measuring design impact. The CASTLE framework addresses this by tracking six key areas—Cognitive Load, Advanced Feature Usage, Satisfaction, Task Efficiency, Learnability, and Errors—that directly connect to business concerns, such as employee productivity, training costs, and software ROI. Designers can demonstrate their value by aligning CASTLE metrics with existing business goals, prioritizing relevant measurements based on specific problems, and gathering data through methods like user testing, support tickets, and pulse surveys.

articles.title: HOW THE LITTLE THINGS IN LIFE BRING WARMTH AND BEAUTY TO THE ART OF PEILIN LI
articles.summary: Illustrator Peilin Li found her distinctive, geometric style by embracing natural expression and storytelling, leading to major awards, global collaborations, and a continually evolving creative practice.

articles.title: WACOM MOVINKPAD PRO 14 SETS A NEW STANDARD FOR PORTABLE CREATIVE TABLETS
articles.summary: The Wacom MovinkPad Pro 14 combines a 14-inch OLED display with a 2880x1800 resolution, 100% color coverage, and a 120Hz refresh rate, alongside Android 15 and the battery-free Pro Pen 3 with 8,192 pressure levels.

articles.title: THESE PROVOCATIVE AI BILLBOARDS WERE DESIGNED TO BE HATED
articles.summary: Friend, a new AI companion brand, launched a provocative billboard campaign across NYC subways with statements deliberately designed to spark backlash and graffiti responses.
